outfits.name: 버건디 실크 랩 탑 + 화이트 마이크로 슬랙스
outfits.prompt: Burgundy Silk Wrap Top  + White Micro Slacks

outfits.name: 화이트 탱크탑 + 베이지 하이웨이스트 티어드 미니스커트
outfits.prompt: minimalist white ribbed cotton tank top with a scoop neckline and sleeveless design, featuring small black 'THIS' typography branding on the left chest, fitted silhouette tucked into a high-waisted beige cotton-twill mini skirt. The skirt features a wide corset-style waistband with vertical seam construction and a drawstring tie detail at the center waist consisting of two cords tied in a bow. The lower portion of the skirt has a voluminous tiered ruffle or frill hem with visible gathers creating a flared silhouette. Accessorized with stacked silver metallic bangles on both wrists and a delicate silver beaded necklace. The lower body includes fine-mesh nude or light tan fishnet stockings providing a subtle textured finish.

outfits.name: 화이트 리본 블라우스 + 네이비 플리츠 미니스커트
outfits.prompt: A classic preppy-style outfit featuring a crisp white short-sleeved blouse with a semi-fitted silhouette. The blouse features a pointed flat collar and a prominent navy blue ribbon bow tie centered at the neckline, made of a matte fabric. It has a front button closure with a hidden placket and short cap sleeves. The bottom is a high-waisted navy blue pleated mini skirt with structured knife pleats that create a flared A-line silhouette. The skirt fabric is a dense, opaque twill or polyester blend with a smooth matte finish. The overall aesthetic is a clean, academic look with a stark color contrast between the bright white top and deep navy bottom, emphasizing a minimalist yet polished school-uniform-inspired style.

outfits.name: 차콜 그레이 오프숄더 로고 티셔츠 + 베이지 레터링 미니스커트
outfits.prompt: A casual streetwear ensemble featuring a charcoal grey oversized cotton t-shirt worn in an asymmetrical off-the-shoulder style, revealing one shoulder with a thin clear strap underneath. The shirt has a medium-scale light blue 'TWICE' logo printed on the chest. The fabric is a soft matte jersey with a relaxed, draped fit and raw, unfinished-looking hem. It is paired with a low-rise beige cotton twill mini skirt that features a large-scale white cursive 'Sugar' embroidery or print across the front. The skirt has a straight silhouette and a finished hemline. The look is a mix of distressed concert merch aesthetic and Y2K-inspired streetwear layering, focusing on a slouchy, deconstructed silhouette.

outfits.name: 그래픽 프린트 블랙 스웻셔츠 + 화이트 핀턱 플리츠 미니스커트
outfits.prompt: black oversized long-sleeve sweatshirt, heavyweight cotton fabric, dropped shoulders, relaxed loose-fit silhouette, large pink and white graphic screen print on back, distressed typography design, ribbed cuffs and hem, high-waisted white tennis mini skirt, structured sunray pleats, voluminous flared hem, crisp fabric texture, black opaque safety shorts layered underneath, streetwear aesthetic, precise construction details.

outfits.name: 화이트 원숄더 언밸런스 크롭탑 + 마이크로 미니 플로럴 스커트
outfits.prompt: A trendy streetwear ensemble featuring a white one-shoulder crop top with an asymmetrical neckline and a single short sleeve. The top is made of medium-weight ribbed cotton, featuring exposed overlock stitching and a jagged, unfinished raw hem that creates an edgy, deconstructed look. A small black graphic text logo is printed on the left chest. The bottom is a lightweight white micro mini skirt adorned with a small-scale, multi-colored red and green floral ditsy print. The skirt is secured by a thick, wide brown leather belt with a large, chunky rectangular silver buckle worn low on the hips. Accessories include a layered gold chain necklace set with a small circular pendant and thin silver hoop earrings. The overall silhouette is fitted and cropped, emphasizing a Y2K-inspired aesthetic.

outfits.name: 스카이 블루 골지 니트 미니 보디콘 원피스
outfits.prompt: long-sleeve mini bodycon dress in a soft sky blue hue, crafted from a fine ribbed knit cotton-blend fabric with a subtle matte texture. The garment features a fitted silhouette that conforms to the body, a clean crew neckline, and extra-long sleeves with a slight gather at the wrists. The construction includes seamless-looking shoulders and a straight hemline that ends at the mid-thigh. The material is medium-weight and opaque, providing a structured yet flexible fit. Visible white cabling from in-ear monitors runs along the back and side, adding a functional tech-wear element to the minimalist aesthetic. No visible hardware or closures, suggesting a pull-on style.
